tasks.subject: Task 1: createJiraWorklog returns a result object
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Change createJiraWorklog's return type from Promise<void> to Promise<{ success: boolean; reason?: string }> so callers can detect real success/failure, without changing its fire-and-forget error-swallowing behavior.

**Files:**
- Modify: packages/shared/src/jira-worklog.ts
- Test: packages/shared/src/jira-worklog.test.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter @jagit/shared test; pnpm -r build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/shared/src/jira-worklog.ts", "packages/shared/src/jira-worklog.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @jagit/shared test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["success:true on 2xx", "success:false+reason on missing/incomplete credentials", "success:false+reason on 4xx/5xx", "never throws", "hook-claude-code still compiles"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: PricingService workday constants
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add USD_PER_WORKDAY (67.5) and HOURS_PER_WORKDAY (8) constants.

**Files:**
- Modify: packages/api/src/pricing/pricing.service.ts
- Test: packages/api/src/pricing/pricing.service.test.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter @jagit/api test -- pricing.service

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/api/src/pricing/pricing.service.ts", "packages/api/src/pricing/pricing.service.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @jagit/api test -- pricing.service", "acceptanceCriteria": ["USD_PER_WORKDAY = 67.5", "HOURS_PER_WORKDAY = 8"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: SessionMcpService.logWork
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement logWork — resolve session, validate preconditions, compute hours from cost, delegate to createJiraWorklog.

**Files:**
- Modify: packages/api/src/session-mcp/session-mcp.service.ts
- Test: packages/api/src/session-mcp/session-mcp.service.test.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter @jagit/api test -- session-mcp.service

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/api/src/session-mcp/session-mcp.service.ts", "packages/api/src/session-mcp/session-mcp.service.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @jagit/api test -- session-mcp.service", "acceptanceCriteria": ["resolves session correctly", "throws NotFoundException/BadRequestException appropriately", "correct hours math", "delegates to createJiraWorklog", "returns LogWorkResult shape"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Wire PricingService into SessionMcpModule
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Import PricingModule into SessionMcpModule so PricingService resolves via DI.

**Files:**
- Modify: packages/api/src/session-mcp/session-mcp.module.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter @jagit/api build; pnpm --filter @jagit/api test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/api/src/session-mcp/session-mcp.module.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @jagit/api build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PricingModule imported", "build succeeds", "no regressions in full test suite"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Register the log-work MCP tool
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose logWork as a log-work tool on the session MCP server, same error convention as activate-jira.

**Files:**
- Modify: packages/api/src/session-mcp/session-mcp.server.ts
- Modify: packages/api/src/session-mcp/session-mcp.controller.test.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter @jagit/api test -- session-mcp.controller; pnpm -r build && pnpm -r test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/api/src/session-mcp/session-mcp.server.ts", "packages/api/src/session-mcp/session-mcp.controller.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @jagit/api test -- session-mcp.controller", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tools/list shows log-work", "success envelope correct", "business errors -> isError:true with message", "unexpected errors -> isError:true 'Internal error', no leaked details"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Session logging & changelog
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Record this session per CLAUDE.md's session-logging convention.

**Files:**
- Create: docs/changelogs/2026-06-22-<HHMM>-session-mcp-log-work.md
- Modify: CHANGELOG.md
- Modify: CLAUDE.md

**Verify:** Manual review; git status shows only intended files.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/changelogs/2026-06-22-session-mcp-log-work.md", "CHANGELOG.md", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "git status", "acceptanceCriteria": ["changelog file created", "CHANGELOG.md updated", "CLAUDE.md plan progress updated"]}
```
